author: terencechain
content:
The only downside is that having two substantial additions in parallel can make merge conflicts a pain to deal with on the client side. That said, it prob will not be too bad. From a quick look, the overlapping areas seem fairly isolated. EIP-7928 appears on beacon state, the payload, and the Engine API call

Is there a consensus-specs PR that reflects the latest progress on merging EIP-7928 into the gloas spec folder? I can take this on in a day or two once the spec is a bit more finalized <@1126229231572094976>
